bibliography.bibliomixed:
Budiman A (2021) Vietnamese in the US fact sheet. Pew Research Center.
https://www.pewresearch.org/social-trends/fact-sheet/asian-americans-vietnamese-in-the-u-s-fact-sheet/

Global Health: Vietnam (2016) Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.
https://www.cdc.gov/globalhealth/countries/vietnam/

Gordon S, Bernadett M, Evans D, Shapiro NB, Dang L (2006) Vietnamese culture: influences and implications for health care. Molina Institute for Cultural Competency.
https://www.molinahealthcare.com/~/media/Molina/Public Website/PDF/providers/nm/medicaid/resource/health_nm_vietnameseculture-influencesandimplicationsforhealthcare_materialandtest.pdf

Harjanto L, Batalova J (2021) Vietnamese immigrants in the United States. Migration Policy Institute.
https://www.migrationpolicy.org/article/vietnamese-immigrants-united-states

La Borde P, Duong B (2010) Vietnamese cultural profile. EthnoMed.
https://ethnomed.org/culture/vietnamese/vietnamese-cultural-profile
Long CO (2021) People of Vietnamese heritage. In: Purnell L, Fenkl EA (eds) Textbook for transcultural health care: a population approach, 5th edn. Springer, Cham

Nguyen DS, Giap N (2019) Death and dying: belief, fear and ritual in Vietnamese culture. In: Selin H, Rakoff RM (eds) Death across cultures. Death and dying in non-western cultures. Springer, Cham. https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-030-18826-9_5
https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-030-18826-9_5

Nguyen VVT, Zheng MY, Liu SM, Kallen MA, Kay K, Ivey SL (2022) Prevalence of traditional Asian postpartum practices at a federally qualified health center. J Immig Minor Health 24(5):1251–1260. https://doi.org/10.1007/s10903-021-01299-0
https://doi.org/10.1007/s10903-021-01299-0

Thai C (2003) Traditional Vietnamese medicine: historical perspective and current usage. EthnoMed.
https://ethnomed.org/clinical/traditional-medicine/traditional-vietnamese-medicine-historical-perspective-and-current-usage

Vietnam—Culture, etiquette and business practice (2022) Commisceo Global.
http://www.commisceo-global.com/country-guides/vietnam-guide
